节点.功能描述:
UIAbility is an application component that has the UI. The UIAbility module, inherited from Ability, provides lifecycle callbacks such as component creation, destruction, and foreground/background switching. It also provides the following capabilities related to component collaboration:
Caller: an object returned by startAbilityByCall. The CallerAbility (caller) uses this object to communicate with the CalleeAbility (callee).
Callee: an internal object of UIAbility. The CalleeAbility (callee) uses this object to communicate with the CallerAbility (caller).
Context of the UIAbility.
Parameters for starting the UIAbility.
Latest Want received through onCreate or onNewWant when the UIAbility is started for multiple times.
Object that invokes the stub service.
Get the string returned by `AbilityStage.onAcceptWant(want: Want)` for the current specified UIAbility.

Called to initialize the service logic when a UIAbility instance in the completely closed state is created. In other words, a UIAbility instance enters this lifecycle callback from a cold start. This API returns the result synchronously and does not support asynchronous callback. the last abnormal exit.
注释信息: @param { Want } want - Want information, including the ability name and bundle name.
@param { AbilityConstant.LaunchParam } launchParam - Parameters for starting the UIAbility, and the reason for

parameters.说明: Want information, including the ability name and bundle name.
Parameters for starting the UIAbility, and the reason for

节点.功能描述: Called when a WindowStage is created for this UIAbility.

parameters.说明: WindowStage information.

节点.功能描述: Called when the WindowStage is about to be destroyed.

parameters.说明: WindowStage information.

节点.功能描述: Called when the WindowStage is destroyed for this UIAbility.
Called when the WindowStage is restored during the migration of this UIAbility, which is a multi-instance ability.

parameters.说明: WindowStage information.

节点.功能描述:
Called to clear resources when this UIAbility is destroyed. This API returns the result synchronously or uses a promise to return the result.

**NOTE**:
After the onDestroy() lifecycle callback is executed, the application may exit. Consequently, the asynchronous function (for example, asynchronously writing data to the database) in onDestroy() may fail to be executed. You can use the asynchronous lifecycle to ensure that the subsequent lifecycle continues only after the asynchronous function in onDestroy() finishes the execution.
注释信息: @returns { void | Promise<void> } the promise returned by the function.
节点.return_description: the promise returned by the function.

节点.功能描述:
Triggered when the application transitions from the background to the foreground. It is called between onWillForeground and onDidForeground. It can be used to request system resources required, for example, requesting location services when the application transitions to the foreground.

**NOTE**:
This API returns the result synchronously and does not support asynchronous callback.
Called back when the state of an ability will changes to foreground.
Called back when the state of an ability changed to foreground.

Triggered when the application transitions from the foreground to the background. It is called between onWillBackground and onDidBackground. It can be used to release resources when the UI is no longer visible, for example, stopping location services.
Called back when the state of an ability will changes to background.
Called back when the state of an ability changed to background.
Called back when an ability prepares to continue.
注释信息: @param { Record<string, Object> } wantParam - Indicates the want parameter.
@returns { AbilityConstant.OnContinueResult | Promise<AbilityConstant.OnContinueResult> } Return the result of onContinue, support promise.

parameters.说明: Indicates the want parameter.

节点.return_description: Return the result of onContinue, support promise.

节点.功能描述: Called when a UIAbility instance that has undergone the following states is started again: started in the foreground, running in the foreground, and switched to the background. The triggering of the onNewWant lifecycle of a UIAbility instance indicates that this launch is a hot launch. Note that a hot launch does not necessarily trigger the onNewWant lifecycle. If you need to prevent the onNewWant lifecycle from being triggered in specific scenarios, you must call the {@link UIAbilityContext.setOnNewWantSkipScenarios} interface to suppress its callback.
注释信息: @param { Want } want - Want information, such as the ability name and bundle name.
@param { AbilityConstant.LaunchParam } launchParam - Reason for the UIAbility startup and the last abnormal exit.

parameters.说明: Want information, such as the ability name and bundle name.
Reason for the UIAbility startup and the last abnormal exit.

节点.功能描述: Called when dump client information is required. This API can be used to dump non-sensitive information.
注释信息: @param { Array<string> } params - Parameters in the form of a command.

parameters.说明: Parameters in the form of a command.

节点.功能描述:
Called when the framework automatically saves the UIAbility state in the case of an application fault. When an application is faulty, the framework calls onSaveState to save the status of the UIAbility if auto-save is enabled.

**NOTE**:
This API is used together with appRecovery.
注释信息: @param { AbilityConstant.StateType } reason - Reason for triggering the callback to save the UIAbility state.
@returns { AbilityConstant.OnSaveResult } Whether the UIAbility state is saved.

parameters.说明: Reason for triggering the callback to save the UIAbility state.
want parameter.

节点.return_description: Whether the UIAbility state is saved.

节点.功能描述: Called back asynchronously when an ability prepares to save. agrees to save data successfully, otherwise errcode.
注释信息: @param { AbilityConstant.StateType } stateType - state type when save.
@param { Record<string, Object> } wantParam - Indicates the want parameter.
@returns { Promise<AbilityConstant.OnSaveResult> } agree with the current UIAbility status or not.return 0 if ability

parameters.说明: state type when save.
Indicates the want parameter.

节点.return_description: agree with the current UIAbility status or not.return 0 if ability

节点.功能描述: Called by this UIAbility to set data to share in the cross-device sharing scenario.
注释信息: @param { Record<string, Object> } wantParam - Data to share.

parameters.说明: Data to share.

节点.功能描述:
Called when this UIAbility is about to terminate. It allows for additional actions to be performed before the UIAbility is officially terminated. For example, you can prompt the user to confirm whether they want to terminate the UIAbility. If the user confirms, you can call terminateSelf to terminate it.

**NOTE**:
Currently, this API takes effect only on 2-in-1 devices.
Since API version 15, this callback is not executed when UIAbility.onPrepareToTerminateAsync is implemented.
When AbilityStage.onPrepareTerminationAsync or AbilityStage.onPrepareTermination is implemented, this callback is not executed if the user right-clicks the dock bar or system tray to close the UIAbility.


The value true means that the termination process is canceled.
The value false means to continue terminating the UIAbility.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } Whether to terminate the UIAbility.

节点.功能描述:
Called when this UIAbility is about to terminate. It allows for additional actions to be performed before the UIAbility is officially terminated. This API uses a promise to return the result. For example, you can prompt the user to confirm whether they want to terminate the UIAbility. If the user confirms, you can call terminateSelf to terminate it.

**NOTE**:
Currently, this API takes effect only on 2-in-1 devices.
When AbilityStage.onPrepareTerminationAsync or AbilityStage.onPrepareTermination is implemented, this callback is not executed if the user right-clicks the dock bar or system tray to close the UIAbility.
If an asynchronous callback crashes, it will be handled as a timeout. If the UIAbility does not respond within 10 seconds, it will be terminated forcibly.


The value true means that the termination process is canceled.
The value false means to continue terminating the UIAbility.
注释信息: @returns { Promise<boolean> } Promise used to return the result.
节点.return_description: Promise used to return the result.

节点.功能描述:
Called when an operation of going back to the previous page is triggered on this UIAbility. The return value determines whether to destroy the UIAbility instance.

**NOTE**:
When the target SDK version is earlier than 12, the default return value is false, indicating that the UIAbility will be destroyed.
When the target SDK version is 12 or later, the default return value is true, indicating that the UIAbility will be moved to the background and will not be destroyed.

and will not be destroyed, and false means that the UIAbility instance will be destroyed.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } The value true means that the UIAbility instance will be moved to the background
节点.return_description: The value true means that the UIAbility instance will be moved to the background

节点.功能描述: Called back when another device start to collaborate.
注释信息: @param { Record<string, Object> } wantParam - Indicates the want parameter.
@returns { AbilityConstant.CollaborateResult } Return the result of onCollaborate.

parameters.说明: Indicates the want parameter.
